generated_oml:
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder mounted directly on motor for first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionData
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder behind gearwheel for first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxPositionData
]

instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring input current I_M for permanent magnet synchronous motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData InputCurrentData
]

instance MotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance GearboxPositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance InputCurrentData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

instance VelocityData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SINUMERIK840DSL
]

instance AccelerationData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SINUMERIK840DSL
]

instance MotorTorqueData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor
]

instance GearTorqueData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Gearwheel
]

instance GearboxTorqueData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CycloidalGearbox
]

instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor for MABI MAX 100 first axis, with input current I_M and output torque τ_M"
]

instance Gearwheel : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Gearwheel component for MABI MAX 100 first axis, outputting torque τ_G"
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox component for MABI MAX 100 first axis, outputting torque τ_out"
]

instance SysMLModeling : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for Model-Based Systems Engineering (MBSE) modeling of MABI MAX 100 first axis"
    DTDFVocab:enables StructuralModelingService
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink for friction simulation and motion analysis"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, MotionAccuracyImprovementService
]

instance AAS : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for MABI MAX 100 first axis metadata management"
    DTDFVocab:enables AssetMetadataService
]

instance MQTTStreaming : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time sensor data streaming to digital shadow"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataStreamingService
]

instance SINUMERIK840DSL : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for sensor data processing and control"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataProcessingService
]

instance DashboardVisualization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization tools for integrated monitoring and analysis"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance SysMLBDD : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for structural modeling of MABI MAX 100 first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModeling
]

instance SysMLIBD : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for structural modeling of MABI MAX 100 first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModeling
]

instance CoulombViscousModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Coulomb-Viscous friction simulation model in MATLAB Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance StribeckModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck friction simulation model in MATLAB Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance DahlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl friction simulation model in MATLAB Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance LuGreModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre friction simulation model in MATLAB Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance AASAsset : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for MABI MAX 100 first axis metadata"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AAS
]

instance MeasuredInputCurrent : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured input current I_M data trace from physical system"
    DTDFVocab:fromData InputCurrentData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance MeasuredMotorTorque : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured torque τ_M from permanent magnet synchronous motor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorTorqueData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance MeasuredGearTorque : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured torque τ_G from gearwheel"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearTorqueData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance MeasuredGearboxTorque : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured torque τ_out from cycloidal gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxTorqueData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance MeasuredVelocity : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured velocity data trace from physical system"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VelocityData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance MeasuredAcceleration : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured acceleration data trace from physical system"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AccelerationData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance SimulatedMotorTorque : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated torque τ_M data trace from friction models"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance SimulatedGearTorque : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated torque τ_G data trace from friction models"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance SimulatedGearboxTorque : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated torque τ_out data trace from friction models"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance StructuralModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Structural modeling service using SysML BDD and IBD"
    DTDFVocab:provides StructuralModelInsight
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous multi-physics-aware identification of joint friction using white-box (Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, LuGre) and black-box models"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionLossDetection, DeviationAnalysis
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integrated visualization of friction models and data in unified dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionVisualization
]

instance MotionAccuracyImprovementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Motion accuracy improvement through friction deviation analysis between simulated and measured data"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlParameterAdjustment
]

instance DataStreamingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time data streaming service via MQTT protocol"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataStreamingInsight
]

instance DataProcessingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Data processing service using SINUMERIK CNC controller"
    DTDFVocab:provides ProcessedDataInsight
]

instance AssetMetadataService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Asset metadata management service via AAS"
    DTDFVocab:provides AssetMetadataInsight
]

instance FrictionLossDetection : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of friction losses in robot axis through deviation analysis"
]

instance DeviationAnalysis : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Analysis of deviation between simulated and measured friction data"
]

instance ControlParameterAdjustment : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjustment of control parameters to improve robot motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance FrictionVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualization of friction models and data for monitoring"
]

instance StructuralModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Structural model insights from SysML BDD and IBD"
]

instance DataStreamingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Data streaming status and quality insights"
]

instance ProcessedDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Processed sensor data insights from SINUMERIK controller"
]

instance AssetMetadataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Asset metadata availability and integrity insights"
]

instance MABIMAX100FirstAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Environment for MABI MAX 100 first axis digital twin"
    base:contains MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder, CurrentSensor, PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, Gearwheel, CycloidalGearbox, SysMLModeling, MATLABSimulink, AAS, MQTTStreaming, SINUMERIK840DSL, DashboardVisualization, SysMLBDD, SysMLIBD, CoulombViscousModel, StribeckModel, DahlModel, LuGreModel, AASAsset
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data streaming and processing for continuous friction model identification during robot operation, with live measurements synchronized to physical system dynamics."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A unified system integrating SysML structural models, Simulink behavioral models, live sensor data via MQTT, and AAS metadata, with processing components computing friction models and displaying integrated results in a dashboard for real-time analysis."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase ('as operated') using live data from the robot during machining tasks, with no focus on design or manufacturing stages."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation through deviation analysis between simulated friction models (white-box/black-box) and reference measurements, with model accuracy assessed against real-world torque and angular velocity data from encoders and current sensors."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time streaming of sensor data (current, position, velocity) from physical robot to digital shadow, with data structured as time-series arrays for processing."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for industrial asset metadata and SysML for model-based systems engineering, adhering to Industrie 4.0 standards."
]
